name: Future Metals NL
description: Future Metals NL is an Australian-based exploration and development company focused on its 100%-owned Panton PGM-Nickel-Chromium Project in the Kimberley region of Western Australia. The Panton Project is a high-grade platinum group metals (PGM) deposit, containing significant palladium, platinum, gold, nickel, and chromite mineralization. The company is dedicated to advancing the project through exploration, resource expansion, and metallurgical optimization to supply critical metals essential for the global energy transition.
